mapper.sql: id, store_id, user_name, mobile, `password`, image, `status`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert:
insert into store_user
id,
store_id,
user_name,
mobile,
`password`,
image,
`status`,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update store_user
store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store_user set store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into store_user (id, store_id, user_name, mobile, `password`, image, `status`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into store_user (id, store_id, user_name, mobile, `password`, image, `status`, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} ) on duplicate key update id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}
